mapper.sql: id, create_time, update_time, type, expect, open_code, zodiac, wave, open_time, file_id
mapper.select:
select
from lottery_history_lao order by expect desc

select
from lottery_history_lao order by expect desc limit #{limit,jdbcType=INTEGER}

select
from lottery_history_lao order by expect desc limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into lottery_history_lao (id, create_time, update_time, type, expect, open_code, zodiac, wave, open_time, file_id) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{expect,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{openCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{zodiac,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{wave,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{openTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{fileId,jdbcType=VARCHAR})

insert into lottery_history_lao
id,
create_time,
update_time,
type,
expect,
open_code,
zodiac,
wave,
open_time,
file_id,
#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{expect,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{openCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{zodiac,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{wave,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{openTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{fileId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
mapper.update:
update lottery_history_lao
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
type = #{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
expect = #{expect,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
open_code = #{openCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
zodiac = #{zodiac,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
wave = #{wave,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
open_time = #{openTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
file_id = #{fileId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update lottery_history_lao set create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, type = #{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, expect = #{expect,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, open_code = #{openCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, zodiac = #{zodiac,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, wave = #{wave,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, open_time = #{openTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, file_id = #{fileId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
